raw.name: Springbank
raw.short_description: Eine Ikone der Handwerklichkeit; führt 100% der Produktion inklusive Mälzen und Abfüllen vor Ort durch.
raw.long_description: Springbank is unique among Scottish distilleries as it is the oldest independent, family-owned distillery and performs 100% of its production on-site, including traditional floor malting. Located in Campbeltown, it produces three distinct brands: Springbank (2.5 times distilled, lightly peated), Longrow (twice distilled, heavily peated), and Hazelburn (triple distilled, unpeated). It is a cult favorite known for its complex, industrial, and oily character.
